title: Phase 8: Polish and Tier 3 Endpoints
description: Profile editing, avatar/header upload, alsoKnownAs for inbound account migration, domain block enforcement, hashtag timelines, search, follow request management, bookmarks, and persona key rotation. These are Tier 3 features from the spec — clients work without them but with degraded UX.
design: Account fields stored as JSON array in accounts.fields_json. Bio rendered from markdown to HTML at update time, stored in bio_html. Avatar/header stored as media rows, referenced by avatar_media_id/header_media_id. Domain blocks checked on every inbound activity before processing. Hashtag timeline indexes via a tags extraction step at post-creation time.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /api/v1/accounts/update_credentials updates bio/display name/fields; avatar and header upload works and appears in client; inbound Move activity migrates follower relationships; domain-blocked accounts have their activities dropped; hashtag timeline returns posts; GET /api/v2/search returns account and hashtag results
